view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that 'If any unavailable, whole booking blocked' is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that 'If any unavailable, whole booking blocked' is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that the system correctly blocks the booking when one of the locations is unavailable, as outlined in the linked use case. The evidence from prior steps, particularly the 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent' steps, confirms that the system's behavior aligns with the requirement. The linked use case explicitly states that if the London room is unavailable, the entire booking is blocked, which is supported by the evidence provided.
